# GitHub Repository Metadata Suggestions

GitHub repository description:

> Open-source Python framework for multi-agent AI orchestration, coding-agent swarms, council voting, provider routing, browser tools, MCP connectors, and workflow automation.

Recommended GitHub topics:

```text
ai-agents
agent-swarm
multi-agent-system
llm
llm-orchestration
autonomous-agents
coding-agents
agent-framework
workflow-automation
openai
anthropic
openrouter
azure-openai
mcp
browser-agents
python
```

Recommended social preview:

- Use `examples/agent_swarm_live_demo_poster.png` or a clean screenshot from `examples/agent_swarm_dashboard.html`.
- Put "Agent Swarm" and "Multi-Agent AI Orchestration Framework" in the image.
- Keep text large enough to read in GitHub link previews.

Launch checklist for star growth:

- Pin this repo on the maintainer profile.
- Add the recommended description and topics in GitHub repository settings.
- Share the live demo GIF plus one concrete workflow on X, LinkedIn, Reddit, Hacker News, and relevant Discord/Slack communities.
- Ask early users to star after they run the quick-start command successfully.
- Open 3 to 5 good-first-issue items for examples, provider docs, and tests.
